name: compliance fetch: /compliance-attest records operator attestation that they hold a valid license to the paywalled framework (compliance/attestations/<framework-id>.yaml)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance/attestations && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-attest.sh" --framework iso-27001-a14 --license-holder "Acme Corp" --license-expiry 2027-01-01 && [ -f compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml ] && grep -E "license_holder.*Acme Corp" compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
